name: Spider
description: High-performance web crawling and content extraction via the Spider CLI (https://spider.cloud), exposed as a declarative `command` tool that shells out to the locally-installed `spider` binary. No API key.
tagline: Crawl and extract web pages for agents

config.description: Crawl a URL with the Spider web crawler and return the extracted page content. Use depth=0 for a single page; depth>0 follows links up to that many hops.

url.description: The URL to crawl and extract content from.

depth.description: How many link hops to follow from the start URL (default 1 — single page only).

limit.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl (default 10).
